## Target Audience

## Key Messages

| Message | For Whom | Channel |
|---------|---------|---------|
| [e.g., "Cut admin time by 60%"] | Primary | Landing page, ads |
| [e.g., "Built for Norwegian healthcare regulations"] | Primary | Sales calls, one-pager |
| [e.g., "AI-powered, GDPR-compliant"] | Both | All channels |

## Channels

> Marketing Agent starts working on these in steg 2.

| Channel | Action | Timeline | Owner |
|---------|--------|----------|-------|
| Landing page | Create with waitlist signup | Steg 2, week 1 | Marketing Agent |
| SEO | Publish 3-5 articles targeting key terms | Steg 2-4 | Marketing Agent |
| LinkedIn | Company page + 2 posts/week | Steg 2 onwards | Marketing Agent |
| Email | Waitlist nurture sequence (3 emails) | Before launch | Marketing Agent |
| Product Hunt | Prepare launch | Launch day | Founder + Marketing |

| [e.g., "EPJ system Norge"] | [est.] | [low/med/high] | High |
| [e.g., "pasientjournal programvare"] | | | Medium |

## Launch Plan

### Pre-launch (steg 2-4)
- [ ] Landing page live with waitlist
- [ ] SEO content published
- [ ] Email sequence ready
- [ ] Social profiles set up

### Launch day (steg 5-6)
- [ ] Product live
- [ ] Email blast to waitlist
- [ ] Social media announcement
- [ ] Product Hunt submission (if applicable)

### Post-launch (steg 7)
- [ ] Monitor signup funnel
- [ ] Collect and publish testimonials
- [ ] Iterate based on user feedback
